title: carex × haematolepis subsp. kattegatensis
intro: Carex × haematolepis subsp. kattegatensis is a sedge plant that is a hybrid of Carex haematolepis and possibly other Carex species, known for its distinctive foliage and habitat in wet environments. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as relieving urinary tract issues, reducing swelling, and aiding in the management of high blood pressure. Carex × haematolepis subsp. kattegatensis has been used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
